sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application Nos.315 and 316 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For order on office objections 2. For order on CMA No.2364/2024 3. For order on CMA No.2365/2024 4. For hearing of main case 09.04.2026 Mr. Faheem Ali Memon, Advocate for the applicant Per learned counsel the questions proposed for determination were covered against the applicant-department by virtue of Supreme Court judgment in the case of Millat Tractors reported as 2024 SCMR 700. In view whereof, he seeks that these references are not pressed and may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Office to place a copy hereof in the connected reference. JUDGE JUDGE Asif
